title: Improved Latency for /v1/payments/initiate
description: Optimized the database query logic for initial payment state creation, reducing p95 latency by ~45ms.

title: OAuth 2.0 Support (Beta)
description: Introduced support for standard OAuth 2.0 flows for third-party integration partners. See the Docs for implementation details.

title: Mandatory Header Change
description: The `X-Kulu-Trace-Id` header is now strictly required for all POST requests. Requests without this header will return a 400 Bad Request.

title: Slack Integration Webhooks
description: New webhook types specifically formatted for direct Slack Incoming Webhook integration.

title: Incorrect Currency Mapping
description: Fixed an edge case where UGX transactions were occasionally mapped to USD in the secondary reporting layer.
